title: Marcus and the Morning Sounds
synopsis: Little Marcus discovers all the wonderful sounds his family makes during a cozy Sunday morning at home.

pages.text: Marcus wakes up. Stretch! Yawn! The sun is warm and bright.

illustration.description: Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes stretching in his crib, golden morning sunlight streaming through the window, soft pajamas, peaceful nursery
illustration.alt: Marcus stretching and yawning in his crib on a sunny morning

pages.text: Mommy's feet go tap-tap-tap down the hall. Daddy's coffee maker goes bubble-bubble-pop!

illustration.description: Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes listening from his crib while family sounds happen around the house, golden hour lighting, cozy family home
illustration.alt: Marcus listening to morning sounds from his family

pages.text: The newspaper goes thump! The pancakes go sizzle-sizzle! Marcus claps his hands - clap-clap-clap!

illustration.description: Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes clapping happily in the kitchen with his family making breakfast, pancakes on the griddle, newspaper on table, warm domestic morning scene
illustration.alt: Marcus clapping while family makes breakfast with pancakes sizzling

pages.text: Marcus loves all the happy morning sounds with his family. What sounds do you hear?

illustration.description: Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes sitting with his diverse family around the breakfast table, everyone in comfortable pajamas, golden sunlight filling the room, newspapers and pancakes, gentle unhurried morning
illustration.alt: Marcus enjoying breakfast with his loving family on a peaceful morning

metadata.illustrationStyle: Sunday morning light, golden hour, family pajamas, newspapers pancakes, gentle unhurried, modern diverse family, lazy morning, sunlit rooms, warm domestic

questions.question: What sound does the coffee maker make?
questions.explanation: The coffee maker goes bubble-bubble-pop when Daddy makes morning coffee!

questions.question: How does Marcus show he's happy?
questions.explanation: Marcus claps his hands clap-clap-clap when he hears the happy morning sounds!

questions.question: What makes the sizzle-sizzle sound?
questions.explanation: The pancakes go sizzle-sizzle when they cook on the griddle for breakfast!
